summary: Frontend E2E testing of new /admin/reseaux (Social networks CRUD) + public Footer + WhatsApp floating button. All 12 acceptance criteria verified: admin login, sidebar link 'Réseaux sociaux', 4 seeded socials rendering with dark circular icons, Add dialog with validation (empty name/URL → toast, invalid URL → backend 400 toast), successful create, toggle active/inactive with Inactif badge, Edit dialog pre-fills correctly, MediaPicker opens with default footer section, Delete confirmation dialog + removal, drag & drop reorder persisted in DB (verified via reload), public footer-socials block renders 4 icons with target=_blank, WhatsApp floating button href points to wa.me/2250707070707?text=... (uses first active WhatsApp social). Cleanup done — TEST_ record deleted, drag order restored to original.
critical_code_review_comments: AdminSocials.jsx (~335 lines) — well structured, single responsibility, react-query cache invalidation includes both admin-socials and public-socials keys, optimistic reorder with rollback on error. No issues.
Footer.jsx correctly gates footer-socials block on length>0 and slugifies name for testid.
WhatsAppButton.jsx correctly falls back to COMPANY.whatsappHref when no active WhatsApp social, and only appends ?text= for wa.me/whatsapp.com URLs.
test_credentials: admin@stmpagri.ci / StmpAgri2025! (from problem statement, verified working)
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_Social record (id=840bd80d-dfa6-4dfb-bba3-f2db81be89e9). Drag-reordered seeded socials then restored initial order (WhatsApp, Instagram, LinkedIn, Facebook). DB clean.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Feature /admin/reseaux fully functional. Backend was already validated (21/21 test_socials.py per iteration 6). Whole feature can be considered production-ready.
